title: Blowin' in the Wind
meaning_summary: Its lyrical durability and songwriter importance keep it commercially relevant even outside pure streaming scale.
revenue_drivers: Publishing and cover-version value matter as much as direct recording revenue.
Canonical status supports catalog discovery and reuse.
Licensing and educational/cultural circulation extend the long tail.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Blowin' in the Wind is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
